{{Quote|How realistic a test is this for the Fleet?|Tolik Yar, to Admiral Gial Ackbar|<ref name="Before the Storm">''[[Before the Storm]]''</ref>}}
'''Tolik Yar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Oolid]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] who represented the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Oolidi]], his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Senate/Legends|Senate]] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]]. In [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], he served as a member of the [[Council on Security and Intelligence]].
